name: run_argdump.py
description: Generate denoised timeseries and Pearson's correlation based connectomes from fmriprep processed dataset.

inputs.description: The directory with the input dataset formatted according to the BIDS standard  (i.e. unaltered fMRIPrep derivative directory).
inputs.name: bids_dir

inputs.description: The directory where the output files should be stored.
inputs.name: output_dir

inputs.description: Level of the analysis that will be performed. Only participantlevel is available.
inputs.name: analysis_level

inputs.description: The label(s) of the participant(s) that should be analyzed. The label corresponds to sub-<participant-label> from the BIDS spec (so it does not include 'sub-'). If this parameter is not provided all subjects should be analyzed. Multiple participants can be specified with a space separated list.
inputs.name: participant_label

inputs.description: Path where subject specific segmentations are stored.
inputs.name: atlases_dir

inputs.description: This argument is deprecated. Please use --atlases-dir instead.
inputs.name: work_dir

inputs.description: The choice of atlas for time series extraction. Default atlas choices are: ['HarvardOxfordCorticalSymmetricSplit', 'Schaefer2018', 'DiFuMo', 'HarvardOxfordSubcortical', 'HarvardOxfordCortical', 'MIST']. User can pass a path to a json file containing configuration for their own choice of atlas. The default is 'Schaefer2018'. (Default: "Schaefer2018")
inputs.name: atlas

inputs.description: The choice of post-processing for denoising. The default choices are: 'simple', 'simple+gsr', 'scrubbing.2', 'scrubbing.2+gsr', 'scrubbing.5', 'scrubbing.5+gsr', 'acompcor50', 'icaaroma'. User can pass a path to a json file containing configuration for their own choice of denoising strategy. The defaultis 'simple'. (Default: "simple")
inputs.name: denoise_strategy

inputs.description: Size of the full-width at half maximum in millimeters of the spatial smoothing to apply to the signal. The default is 5.0. (Default: 5)
inputs.name: smoothing_fwhm

inputs.description: Reindex BIDS data set, even if layout has already been created.
inputs.name: reindex_bids

inputs.description:
A JSON file describing custom BIDS input filters using PyBIDS. We use the same format as described in fMRIPrep documentation: https://fmriprep.org/en/latest/faq.html#how-do-i-select-only-certain-files-to-be-input-to-fmriprep 
However, the query filed should always be 'bold'
inputs.name: bids_filter_file

inputs.description: Calculate average correlation within each network. This is a python implementation of the matlab code from the NIAK connectome pipeline (option A). The default is False.
inputs.name: calculate_intranetwork_average_correlation
